/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/neolith.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/neolith.dir/main.c.o CMakeFiles/stem.dir/addr_resolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stem.dir/apply.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stem.dir/backend.c.o CMakeFiles/stem.dir/call_out.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stem.dir/comm.c.o CMakeFiles/stem.dir/command.c.o CMakeFiles/stem.dir/ed.c.o CMakeFiles/stem.dir/error_context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stem.dir/frame.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stem.dir/interpret.c.o CMakeFiles/stem.dir/ffi_efun.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stem.dir/spatial_efun.c.o CMakeFiles/stem.dir/aoi_efun.c.o CMakeFiles/stem.dir/lj_ffi/lj_ffi_type.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stem.dir/lj_ffi/lj_ffi_cdef.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stem.dir/lj_ffi/lj_ffi_call.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stem.dir/dxalloc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stem.dir/outbuf.c.o CMakeFiles/stem.dir/simul_efun.c.o CMakeFiles/stem.dir/simulate.c.o CMakeFiles/stem.dir/stack.c.o CMakeFiles/stem.dir/stem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stem.dir/stralloc.c.o -o neolith  ../lib/libgtest.a ../lib/efuns/libefuns.a ../lib/lpc/liblpc.a ../lib/json/libjson.a -ldl ../lib/socket/libsocket.a ../lib/misc/libmisc.a ../lib/rc/librc.a ../lib/async/libasync.a ../lib/logger/liblogger.a ../lib/port/libport.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lpthread ../lib/spatial/libneolith_spatial.a ../lib/libgtest.a -lm -lffi
